distractor_plausibility.note: All 36 distractors still encode real beginner misconceptions (fragile all-or-nothing, DictReader type/range-checks, int() catches out-of-range, bare/broad except is safest, short-row carry-forward, printing counts as persisting, TypeError on mixed list). verdict: Pass - length bias resolved: re-measured all 12 MCQ, 0 longest-correct (rate 0.0 <= 0.40, was 0.417); q2/q8/q9/q11/q12 rebalanced correctly with no change to correct answer, position, or stem.
